form.label: Qwock's CryptView — CBOM & PQC Readiness Command Center
form.description: Splunk-native crypto asset visibility, certificate lifecycle risk, and post-quantum readiness evidence.

search.query: $index_scope$ sourcetype=cryptview:cbom:asset | stats latest(*) as * by asset_id | eval asset_search_field=lower(coalesce(asset_display_name, asset_id, asset_host, "")) | eval asset_host_display=case(isnull(asset_host) OR asset_host="" OR asset_host="null","-",1=1,asset_host) | eval asset_port_display=case(isnull(asset_port) OR asset_port="" OR asset_port="null","-",1=1,tostring(asset_port)) | eval owner_display=case(isnull(owner) OR owner="" OR owner="null","-",1=1,owner) | eval system_display=case(isnull(system) OR system="" OR system="null","-",1=1,system) | eval business_unit_display=case(isnull(business_unit) OR business_unit="" OR business_unit="null","-",1=1,business_unit) | eval environment_display=case(isnull(environment) OR environment="" OR environment="null","-",1=1,environment) | eval pqc_transport_bucket=case( pqc_probe_status="hybrid_observed","Hybrid/PQC observed", pqc_probe_status="not_tested","Not tested", match(coalesce(pqc_probe_status, ""), "no_hybrid"),"Probe ran: no hybrid", match(coalesce(pqc_key_exchange_status, ""), "^No hybrid/PQC key exchange negotiated"),"Probe ran: no hybrid", 1=1,"Unknown" ) | eval pqc_transport_order=case( pqc_transport_bucket="Hybrid/PQC observed",1, pqc_transport_bucket="Not tested",2, pqc_transport_bucket="Probe ran: no hybrid",3, 1=1,4 ) | eval certificate_identity_bucket=case( like(coalesce(pqc_certificate_identity, ""), "Classical RSA%"),"Classical RSA", like(coalesce(pqc_certificate_identity, ""), "Classical ECDSA%"),"Classical ECDSA", pqc_certificate_in_use="Yes","PQC certificate/signature", pqc_certificate_in_use="No","Classical other", 1=1,"Unknown" ) | eval certificate_identity_order=case( certificate_identity_bucket="PQC certificate/signature",1, certificate_identity_bucket="Classical RSA",2, certificate_identity_bucket="Classical ECDSA",3, certificate_identity_bucket="Classical other",4, 1=1,5 ) | eval evidence_confidence_bucket=case( pqc_confidence="High","High", pqc_confidence="Medium","Medium", pqc_confidence="Low","Low", 1=1,"Unknown" ) | eval evidence_confidence_order=case( evidence_confidence_bucket="High",1, evidence_confidence_bucket="Medium",2, evidence_confidence_bucket="Low",3, 1=1,4 ) | eval legacy_pqc_posture_bucket=case( pqc_posture="pqc_ready","PQC ready", pqc_posture="hybrid_ready","Hybrid ready", pqc_posture="classical_only","Classical-only", 1=1,"Unknown" ) | eval legacy_pqc_posture_order=case( legacy_pqc_posture_bucket="PQC ready",1, legacy_pqc_posture_bucket="Hybrid ready",2, legacy_pqc_posture_bucket="Classical-only",3, 1=1,4 ) | eval issuer_bucket=coalesce(issuer, "Unknown issuer") | eval risk_score_bucket=case( isnull(risk_score),"Unknown", risk_score>=80,"80-100", risk_score>=60,"60-79", risk_score>=40,"40-59", risk_score>=20,"20-39", 1=1,"0-19" ) | eval risk_score_order=case( risk_score_bucket="80-100",1, risk_score_bucket="60-79",2, risk_score_bucket="40-59",3, risk_score_bucket="20-39",4, risk_score_bucket="0-19",5, 1=1,6 ) | eval renewal_window=case( expiry_days<=30,"<= 30 days", expiry_days<=60,"31-60 days", expiry_days<=90,"61-90 days", expiry_days>90,"91+ days", 1=1,"Unknown" ) | eval renewal_window_order=case( renewal_window="<= 30 days",1, renewal_window="31-60 days",2, renewal_window="61-90 days",3, renewal_window="91+ days",4, 1=1,5 ) | eval key_size_bucket=case( key_type="RSA" AND key_size<2048,"Weak RSA < 2048", key_type="RSA" AND key_size=2048,"RSA 2048", key_type="RSA" AND key_size>=3072,"RSA 3072+", key_type="ECDSA" AND key_size<256,"Weak ECDSA < 256", key_type="ECDSA" AND key_size>=256,"ECDSA 256+", key_type="ED25519","Ed25519", isnull(key_size),"Unknown", 1=1,coalesce(key_type, "Unknown") . " " . tostring(key_size) ) | eval key_size_order=case( key_size_bucket="Weak RSA < 2048",1, key_size_bucket="RSA 2048",2, key_size_bucket="RSA 3072+",3, key_size_bucket="Weak ECDSA < 256",4, key_size_bucket="ECDSA 256+",5, key_size_bucket="Ed25519",6, 1=1,7 ) | eval classical_certificate_flag=if(match(certificate_identity_bucket, "^Classical"), "Yes", "No") | eval asset_host_port=case( asset_host_display="-" AND asset_port_display="-", "-", asset_port_display="-", asset_host_display, 1=1, asset_host_display . ":" . asset_port_display ) | eval key_label=case( isnull(key_size) OR key_size="", coalesce(key_type, "Unknown"), 1=1, coalesce(key_type, "Unknown") . " " . tostring(key_size) ) | eval expiry_label=case( isnull(expiry_days), coalesce(expiry_status, "Unknown"), 1=1, coalesce(expiry_status, "Unknown") . " / " . tostring(expiry_days) . "d" ) | where ("$asset_search$"="*" OR like(asset_search_field, "%" . lower("$asset_search$") . "%")) AND ("$priority_filter$"="*" OR priority="$priority_filter$") AND ("$pqc_cert_filter$"="*" OR pqc_certificate_in_use="$pqc_cert_filter$") AND ("$pqc_kex_filter$"="*" OR pqc_transport_bucket="$pqc_kex_filter$") AND ("$cert_identity_filter$"="*" OR certificate_identity_bucket="$cert_identity_filter$")

$index_scope$ sourcetype=cryptview:cbom:event | eval event_search_field=lower(coalesce(display_name, asset_id, "")) | where ("$asset_search$"="*" OR like(event_search_field, "%" . lower("$asset_search$") . "%")) AND ("$priority_filter$"="*" OR priority="$priority_filter$")

div.style: padding:18px 20px; border-radius:10px; background:linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #16243f 52%, #0b1220 100%); border-left:5px solid #22d3ee; color:#e2f3ff;
div.div: Qwock's CryptView — CBOM & PQC Readiness Command Center
Splunk-native crypto asset visibility, certificate lifecycle risk, and post-quantum readiness evidence.
Splunk visualizes CryptView output. It does not run scans, PQC probes, or change the CryptView source of truth.
Asset host and port come from CryptView fields asset_host and asset_port; Splunk's raw host metadata is the input host.

search.query: | stats count as value

single.option: Latest unique assets after deduplicating by asset_id

search.query: | search expiry_status=expiring_30d OR expiry_status=expiring_90d | stats count as value

single.option: Certificates currently inside the 90-day renewal window

search.query: | search expiry_status=expired | stats count as value

single.option: Certificates already beyond their validity period

search.query: | search priority=P0 OR priority=P1 | stats count as value

single.option: Assets currently demanding the fastest review or remediation

search.query: | search pqc_transport_bucket="Not tested" | stats count as value

single.option: Standard TLS evidence exists, but no active PQC probe confirmed transport readiness

search.query: | search classical_certificate_flag=Yes | stats count as value

single.option: Certificate or signature layer remains classical

search.query: | search pqc_certificate_in_use=Yes | stats count as value

single.option: Certificate or signature evidence already indicates PQC capability

search.query: | search pqc_transport_bucket="Hybrid/PQC observed" | stats count as value

single.option: Assets where CryptView observed transport-layer hybrid/PQC evidence

html.div: Short display buckets keep the readiness story readable: transport evidence, certificate identity, and confidence are all charted separately.

div.style: padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #cbd5e1; border-left:4px solid #22d3ee; border-radius:8px; color:#334155;
div.div: CryptView separates certificate identity, transport/key-exchange evidence, and evidence confidence. Standard TLS scans show PQC transport as "Not tested" unless an active PQC probe ran.

search.query: | stats count by pqc_transport_order pqc_transport_bucket | sort pqc_transport_order | fields - pqc_transport_order
| stats count by certificate_identity_order certificate_identity_bucket | sort certificate_identity_order | fields - certificate_identity_order
| stats count by evidence_confidence_order evidence_confidence_bucket | sort evidence_confidence_order | fields - evidence_confidence_order
| stats count by legacy_pqc_posture_order legacy_pqc_posture_bucket | sort legacy_pqc_posture_order | fields - legacy_pqc_posture_order

html.div: Track expiry pressure, issuer concentration, and key-size signals alongside the PQC migration story.

search.query: | stats count by expiry_status | sort - count
| stats count by renewal_window_order renewal_window | sort renewal_window_order | fields - renewal_window_order
| stats count by issuer_bucket | sort - count | head 10
| stats count by key_size_order key_size_bucket | sort key_size_order | fields - key_size_order

html.div: Use priority, risk reasons, and layered PQC evidence together to focus remediation and migration work.

search.query: | stats count by priority | sort priority
| stats count by risk_score_order risk_score_bucket | sort risk_score_order | fields - risk_score_order

| eval risk_reason=case(mvcount(risk_reasons)>1, mvjoin(risk_reasons, "; "), isnull(risk_reasons) OR risk_reasons="", "None recorded", 1=1, tostring(risk_reasons)) | makemv delim="; " risk_reason | mvexpand risk_reason | stats count by risk_reason | sort - count | head 10

| sort 0 priority - risk_score expiry_days | eval Asset=coalesce(asset_display_name, asset_id), Host=asset_host_display, Port=asset_port_display, Owner=owner_display, Priority=priority, Risk=risk_score, PQC_Transport=pqc_key_exchange_status, Certificate_Identity=pqc_certificate_identity, PQC_Cert=pqc_certificate_in_use, Recommended_Action=pqc_recommended_next_action, Expiry=expiry_label | rename PQC_Transport AS "PQC Transport" Certificate_Identity AS "Certificate Identity" PQC_Cert AS "PQC Cert" Recommended_Action AS "Recommended Action" | table Asset Host Port Owner Priority Risk risk_reasons "PQC Transport" "Certificate Identity" "PQC Cert" Expiry "Recommended Action" | head 20

html.div: Cleaner display labels keep the inventory readable while the layered PQC fields remain available additively.

search.query: | eval Asset=coalesce(asset_display_name, asset_id), Host=asset_host_display, Port=asset_port_display, Owner=owner_display, System=system_display, Business_Unit=business_unit_display, Environment=environment_display, TLS=tls_version, Key=key_label, Expiry=expiry_label, Priority=priority, Risk=risk_score, PQC_Transport=pqc_key_exchange_status, Certificate_Identity=pqc_certificate_identity, PQC_Cert=pqc_certificate_in_use, Evidence=pqc_evidence_level, Confidence=pqc_confidence, Recommended_Action=pqc_recommended_next_action | rename Business_Unit AS "Business Unit" PQC_Transport AS "PQC Transport" Certificate_Identity AS "Certificate Identity" PQC_Cert AS "PQC Cert" Recommended_Action AS "Recommended Action" | table Asset Host Port Owner System "Business Unit" Environment TLS Key Expiry Priority Risk "PQC Transport" "Certificate Identity" "PQC Cert" Evidence Confidence "Recommended Action"

html.div: Supporting event context from the existing `cryptview:cbom:event` sourcetype stays lower in the dashboard so posture and readiness lead the story.

search.query: | stats count by event_type | sort - count

| sort 0 - changed_at | eval Asset=coalesce(display_name, asset_id), Current_Priority=current_priority, Previous_Priority=previous_priority, Current_PQC=current_pqc_posture, Previous_PQC=previous_pqc_posture, Expiry=coalesce(expiry_status, "Unknown") . " / " . tostring(expiry_days) . "d", Risk=risk_score | rename Current_Priority AS "Current Priority" Previous_Priority AS "Previous Priority" Current_PQC AS "Current PQC" Previous_PQC AS "Previous PQC" | table changed_at event_type Asset "Current Priority" "Previous Priority" "Current PQC" "Previous PQC" Expiry Risk | head 20

div.style: padding:14px 16px; background:#f8fafc; border:1px dashed #94a3b8; border-radius:8px; color:#334155;
div.div: Once `cryptview:audit` is ingested, this section can surface login failures, scan-job activity, CSV import events, retention operations, and anonymous quick-scan oversight. The current TA already supports monitoring `reports/workspaces/<workspace_id>/audit.log`, `reports/public_ephemeral/audit.log`, or scheduled exports from `/api/audit/export.ndjson`.
